name: sdlc-workflow-codex
description: Native Codex SDLC plugin: five handwritten router skills ($wf, $wf-quick, $wf-meta, $wf-docs, $review) plus independent engineering skills, over the same shared runtime, hub, and .ai/ artifacts as the Claude sdlc-workflow plugin. Design folds into $wf design. Requires Codex CLI 0.139.0+.

interface.longDescription: A handwritten Codex-native SDLC plugin with router-name parity to the Claude sdlc-workflow plugin (five routers + independent skills), driving a 10-stage lifecycle with per-slice artifacts, runtime-truth verification, and a shared machine-wide hub/runtime that both hosts adopt. Skills are handwritten for Codex; the runtime, hub, renderer, schemas, and .ai/ artifacts are shared. Review and trust the bundled hooks before activation.
defaultPrompt: Run the next SDLC stage for this workflow.
Review the current branch across the pre-merge dimensions.
Investigate and fix this failing test.
